case_title: CAROLYNN BREEDLOVE VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BREEDLOVE, CAROLYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,870.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,935.00, BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THAT THE DPW TRUCK WAS STOPPED WHEN PLAINTIFF OPENED THE CAR DOOR; THE TRUCK OPERATOR MOVED WHEN IT WAS UNSAFE TO DO SO. PLAINTIFF CAN RECOVER FOR THE COST OF REPAIR AND 10 DAYS' REPLACEMENT COST, ESTIMATED AT $25 PER DAY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CAROLYNN BREEDLOVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIM ADJUSTER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON PLAINTIFF CLAIM. DEFENDANT CCSF WAIVES SERVICES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY BREEDLOVE, CAROLYNN AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (MAILED:CCSF DEPT OF PUBLIC WORKS-OFFICE OF THE CITY ATTORNEY-CITY HALL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BREEDLOVE, CAROLYNN AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
